mappings.raw_text: Compute per-sentence lexical entropy and bias generation toward context-appropriate synonymy when entropy is too low.

mappings.raw_text: Parse clause depth per sentence and inject compensating low-depth or high-depth sentences when run limits are exceeded.

mappings.raw_text: Tag each paragraph with an information-density band and route generation constraints through that band profile.

mappings.raw_text: Score each sentence on a register axis and block abrupt register jumps beyond configured drift thresholds.

mappings.raw_text: Load per-character idiosyncrasy profiles and enforce bounded reuse of signature discourse markers or phrase fossils.

mappings.raw_text: Apply FID blend coefficients in POV-deep scenes and keep coefficient changes smooth across adjacent sentences.

mappings.raw_text: Compute a residue vector at scene end and bias the next scene with decayed lexical, affective, and conceptual carryover.

mappings.raw_text: Apply disfluency policies by character archetype and tension level.
